name: Cheesecake Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine crumbs and butter. Firmly press into bottom and up the sides of a 9-inch pie plate. Chill.
2. Blend cream cheese, sugar, eggs, vanilla, and lemon juice.
3. Pour mixture into prepared crust; bake at 325 degrees for 25 minutes.
4. Remove from oven.
5. Meanwhile, in a small bowl, combine sour cream, sugar, and vanilla.
6. Spread over pie; bake an additional 5 minutes.
7. Cool to room temperature; refrigerate at least 5 hours.
Or use a 9-inch prepared graham cracker pie crust.
